source: Workflow wf_3e89fe44-1ce — 3-lens review of design.md v2 (regression + new) + synthesis
verification_notes: main agent verified R2-P0-1 (我自己漏寫繼承)/ R2-P0-2 (finmind.py:1125-1140 確認 per-day fan-out)/ R2-P0-3 (17 date.today() in services/)/ R2-P0-5 (date.strftime confirms Saturday)。R2-P0-4 mechanical(對齊現有 tests/conftest.py pattern)。

findings.problem: class FakeFinMindClient: 缺 (FinMindClient) 繼承 + __init__ 沒 _http/_limiter/_token/_inflight 等 inherited 屬性 → first fetch_* AttributeError。
findings.fix_in_v3: 改 `class FakeFinMindClient(FinMindClient):`,FinMindClient.__init__ 在 FAKE_FINMIND=1 時 skip httpx + skip token check + set _limiter=NoOpBucket,FakeFinMindClient.__init__ 變 super().__init__()。SC-2 verify 加 isinstance + hasattr 檢查。

findings.location: design.md §3 SC-2 _get candidate algorithm + §2 fixtures list
findings.problem: (a) path-tail endpoint(no dataset query param)失敗 (b) window methods per-day fan out 88 call vs 1 window file = 6% cover (c) oi_large_traders 用 dataset+start+end 無 data_id 形狀,未涵蓋。
findings.fix_in_v3: 選政策 b:_get stub 在 FakeFinMindClient 啟動時 preload 所有 *.json 到記憶體 by (dataset, data_id),_get 接到 (data_id, start==end) 時 in-memory date filter,合 service 層 per-day 切片邏輯。Candidate 補 path-tail fallback `params['dataset'] or url.rsplit('/',1)[-1]`,補 dataset+start+end 候選。

findings.location: design.md §5 + SC-7 conftest + playwright webServer env
findings.problem: page.clock 只凍 browser;backend `date.today()` × 17 處不凍 → window 端點以 wall-clock 算,fixture key 對不上。
findings.fix_in_v3: 新增 `services/clock.py::today()` indirection;17 處 swap 成 `from services.clock import today`;讀 env `FAKE_TODAY`(只在 FAKE_FINMIND=1 啟用)。Playwright config webServer.env + tests_e2e/conftest.py + .github/workflows/e2e.yml 都加 `FAKE_TODAY=2026-06-26`。

findings.location: design.md §3 SC-7 conftest.py + playwright webServer + CI yml
findings.problem: FAKE_FINMIND 沒 scope CHIP_DATA_DIR → 真假料 cache 雙向污染。
findings.fix_in_v3: tests_e2e/conftest.py session-scope autouse `monkeypatch.setenv('CHIP_DATA_DIR', tmp_path_factory.mktemp('e2e_cache'))`;playwright webServer.env `CHIP_DATA_DIR='./e2e/.cache'`(加 gitignore);CI yml backend-api-contract job env 同。

findings.location: design.md §7 Open Decisions fixture date + 全文
findings.problem: **2026-06-27 是星期六不是星期五**。trading day → 2026-06-26 (Fri),no-trading-day → 2026-06-27 (Sat)。十幾處 fixture filename + clock-pin + SC-8 + visual baseline 全寫錯。
findings.fix_in_v3: 全文 grep-replace `2026-06-27` (trading day context) → `2026-06-26`;`2026-06-28` (Sat context) → `2026-06-27`;新加邊界註解 §7 'date 必驗 strftime %A'。brainstorm.md 也補 amendment。

findings.problem: fixture 'TaiwanCalendar' 不對應真實 dataset;_fetch_raw_dates_from_finmind 實際拉 TaiwanFuturesDaily(data_id=TX) 推交易日。schema 未定 + 跨年 boundary 漏洞。
findings.fix_in_v3: fixture 重命名 `TaiwanFuturesDaily_TX_calendar.json`,schema = `{'data':[{'date':'YYYY-MM-DD'},...]}`。gate body 寫 `[date.fromisoformat(r['date']) for r in load['data']]`。文件要求 date coverage `[today - _BACKFILL_DAYS, today + 1y]`。

findings.problem: test.list() 不是 Playwright public API;regex 也沒鎖門檻;beforeAll fires per worker。
findings.fix_in_v3: live-guard.ts 鎖 fs.readFileSync + regex `/^\s*test\s*\(/gm`,門檻 `count <= 3`;改 globalSetup 跑(per-config one-shot)。

findings.problem: Playwright + CI=true + 缺 baseline = fail(不會 auto-create)。Win32 dev 也建不了 Linux baseline。第一次 CI run 必紅。
findings.fix_in_v3: 新增 `.github/workflows/e2e-update-snapshots.yml` workflow_dispatch only,跑 `playwright test --update-snapshots visual.spec.ts` 後開 PR;e2e/README.md 加 bootstrap 章節說明 Docker 命令給 Win32 dev 本機驗證。

findings.problem: dead fixture — _get candidate 不會 resolve 到這個 filename;no-trading-day 走 `return []` catch-all。
findings.fix_in_v3: drop empty_no_trading_day.json;§5 加一句:'Sat/Sun case 依賴 _get fallback [] catch-all'。

findings.problem: F12 promise 'lifespan 啟動時 fail-loud'。實際 code 把檢查放在 get_finmind() lazy 路徑。
findings.fix_in_v3: main.py lifespan startup 前置 `fake = os.getenv('FAKE_FINMIND', ''); if fake not in ('', '0', '1'): raise RuntimeError(...)`,在 await load_symbols() 前。get_finmind 內檢查保留 defense-in-depth。

findings.problem: N4 部分 vacuous — 預設 equity → 點 options,assert market-heatmap count=0 是 tautology(MarketPage 從未 mount)。只 chip-brokers 那邊有意義。
findings.fix_in_v3: N4 改三步流程:(1) equity start → options switch → assert chip-brokers count 0;(2) equity start → market switch → assert visible → options switch → assert market-heatmap count 0;(3) market start → options switch。所有對 mode 對稱檢。

findings.problem: 10 root testid 是 production source 的 test-only contract,無 enforcement statement → 未來 refactor 可能靜默砍掉。
findings.fix_in_v3: §6 footer 加段:'這 10 testid 是 spec contract;改名/砍除需同 PR 改 e2e/helpers/selectors.ts + 影響 spec。CI E2E 是 enforcement gate。' CI 可加 grep gate(P3 polish,延 Phase 5 評估)。

findings.problem: 誇大;_get-layer stub 只 cover finmind_realtime(1/3 bypass);trading_calendar + symbols 仍需另 env gate。
findings.fix_in_v3: Changelog 改:'_get-layer stub covers finmind_realtime bypass; trading_calendar + symbols 仍各自 env gate per §2 modify table。' §4 'No bypass' 段同步調整。

findings.problem: spec content 不完整 — 沒 installFixtureClock,沒說 4 options hook 是否會用 today 蓋過 ?date= 致 inconsistent。
findings.fix_in_v3: SC-8 補 snippet `await installFixtureClock(page); await page.goto('/?mode=options&date=2026-06-27'); await expect(page.getByText('無交易日')).toBeVisible();` + guard assertion 確認 4 hook 都讀 ?date= 而非 browser today。

next_action: v3 rewrite — substantial. R2-P0-2/R2-P0-3 是 invasive 改動(window in-memory slicing + services/clock.py 17 call site swap + FAKE_TODAY env wire 3 處)。需要 user 確認方向再寫 v3。
